bird.name: Dusky leaftosser
bird.summary: The dusky leaftosser or South American leaftosser (Sclerurus obscurior) is a bird in subfamily Sclerurinae, the leaftossers and miners, of…

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

relations.subject: Dusky leaftosser
relations.evidence: bahiae, the exact spatial and elevational boundaries between the subspecies are not known. The dusky leaftosser generally inhabits moist tropical evergreen forest throughout its range, from lowland rainforest to humid sub-montane forest
